name: PHP 8 ChangeLog
snippet: Fixed CVE-2026-44928 (In uriparser before 1.0.2, the function family EqualsUri can misclassify two unequal URIs as equal). (CVE-2026-44928). Version 8.5.

name: PHP End-of-Life Dates: Support Timeline for Every Version (2026)
snippet: PHP 8.3 entered security-only support at the end of 2025. It will continue receiving critical security patches through December 31, 2027.

name: CVE-2024-8926: PHP Command Injection RCE Vulnerability
snippet: CVE-2024-8926 is a command injection RCE flaw in PHP versions 8.1.*, 8.2.*, and 8.3.* that bypasses CVE-2024-4577 fixes on Windows systems. This ...
